48 A7H A7H_MCAID_MCARE (A7H) Medicaid Resident Liability/Medicare Co-Pay CHAR 1 Identification and background information: current payment sources - Medicaid resident liability or Medicare copay. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
